Bash(/tmp/create_config_tables.sql << 'EOF'
-- Evolution API Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS evolution_api_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  api_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  api_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  instance TEXT DEFAULT 'nexus-whatsapp',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- N8N Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS n8n_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  webhook_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Redis Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS redis_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  redis_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  redis_token TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Sentry Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sentry_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  dsn TEXT NOT NULL,
  auth_token TEXT,
  organization TEXT,
  project TEXT,
  environment TEXT DEFAULT 'production',
  traces_sample_rate TEXT DEFAULT '0.1',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Cloudflare Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cloudflare_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  zone_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  api_token TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Better Stack Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS better_stack_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_token TEXT NOT NULL,
  ingesting_host TEXT DEFAULT 'in.logs.betterstack.com',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Total Express Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS total_express_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  "user" TEXT NOT NULL,
  password TEXT NOT NULL,
  reid TEXT NOT NULL,
  service TEXT DEFAULT 'EXP',
  test_mode BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  profit_margin REAL DEFAULT 1.4,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Supabase Master Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS supabase_master_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  supabase_master_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  supabase_master_service_role_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Resend Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS resend_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  api_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  from_email TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Cache Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cache_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  progressive_ttl BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  thresholds JSON,
  default_ttl INTEGER DEFAULT 3600,
  batch_invalidation BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  cache_warming BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  compression BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Optimizer Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS optimizer_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  field_set VARCHAR DEFAULT 'default',
  page_size INTEGER DEFAULT 50,
  pagination_type VARCHAR DEFAULT 'cursor',
  query_caching BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  aggregation BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Monitoring Config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS monitoring_config \(
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  redis_usage BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  supabase_usage BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  thresholds JSON,
  alerts BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  auto_actions BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\);

-- Create unique indexes
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_evolution_api_tenant ON evolution_api_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_n8n_tenant ON n8n_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_redis_tenant ON redis_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sentry_tenant ON sentry_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cloudflare_tenant ON cloudflare_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_better_stack_tenant ON better_stack_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_total_express_tenant ON total_express_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_supabase_master_tenant ON supabase_master_config\(tenant_id\);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_resend_tenant ON resend_config\(tenant_id\);
EOF)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='230723Davi#b' psql -h 103.199.187.145 -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "
SELECT 
  table_name,
  \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = t.table_name\) as total_columns
FROM information_schema.tables t
WHERE table_schema = ''public'' 
  AND table_name IN \(''store_banners'', ''store_benefits'', ''store_campaigns'', ''store_mosaics'', ''store_videos''\)
ORDER BY table_name;
")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='230723Davi#b' psql -h 103.199.187.145 -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres -c "

WHERE table_schema = ''public'' 
  AND table_name LIKE ''store%banner%''
ORDER BY table_name;
")
